untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based seasonal filtering (January effect) and index membership filtering (S&P 600 small-cap), neither of which are available in the allowed indicators list. The 'is' operator is not designed for calendar months or index membership. Additionally, the signal references mean-reversion and market downturn benefits but provides no specific technical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). The source text is incomplete and does not provide actionable entry/exit thresholds.
translation_notes: This is a calendar-seasonal strategy that cannot be properly expressed with technical indicators alone. It requires: (1) date/calendar filtering logic not available in indicator set, (2) security identifier/index filtering, and (3) regime-specific mean-reversion parameters that were intentionally omitted by the author. To make this translatable, the signal would need explicit technical conditions (e.g., RSI thresholds, Bollinger Band reversals, or volatility measures) that define the mean-reversion entry/exit logic.
